overall.description: A nighttime walk along a wet suburban street in a video game environment (resembling GTA V). The scene features overcast skies, street lighting, passing vehicles, and residential buildings. The camera moves steadily forward along the roadside as cars drive past in the opposite direction.

events.description: red sedan drives past from right to left on the wet road

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the right edge of the road near a yellow fire hydrant

notable_agents.action: red sedan with headlights on driving past in the opposite direction

entered.detail: bright yellow fire hydrant on the roadside grass verge
modern two-story house with illuminated windows and dark roof
tall street light casting bright light on the wet asphalt
wooden utility pole with overhead wires
vehicle parked on the left side of the road in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet suburban street at night with a yellow fire hydrant prominently visible on the left verge. A two-story house with lit windows stands on the right while street lights illuminate the glistening road surface. A red sedan drives past from right to left as the camera walks forward along the roadside.

events.description: black pickup truck drives past from right to left
dark sedan drives past from right to left

agents.ego_description: continuing along the road as multiple vehicles pass by in the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: black pickup truck with bright headlights driving past closely

entered.detail: street sign visible on the left side of the road

segments.scene_description: As the camera progresses along the road, a black pickup truck and subsequently a dark sedan drive past from right to left. The two-story house recedes into the distance on the right while a road sign becomes visible on the left. The wet pavement continues to reflect the street lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: curving suburban road with tree line

events.description: road curves to the left as the camera follows the bend

agents.ego_description: following the curve of the road as it bends left, moving into a more tree-lined section

entered.detail: headlights of vehicles visible in the far distance
thick line of trees along the left side of the curving road

segments.scene_description: The residential building disappears from view as the road curves gently to the left. The environment becomes more open with dense trees lining both sides of the road. Street lights continue to illuminate the wet asphalt ahead, with distant vehicle lights visible in the far distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a wet suburban street at night that gradually transitions from a residential neighborhood into a more secluded, wooded area. It begins beside a yellow fire hydrant on the left verge, passing a two-story house with lit windows as a red sedan drives by on the glistening road. As the camera progresses, the house recedes into the distance and a road sign appears on the left while a black pickup truck and a dark sedan pass in the opposite direction. The scene then shifts as the residential buildings disappear and the road curves gently to the left, opening up into an environment lined with dense trees on both sides. Finally, the camera continues along the wet asphalt, guided by the glow of street lights and the distant glimmer of oncoming vehicle lights.
